name: How does AI visibility website optimization work step by step?

mainEntity.name: How does AI visibility website optimization work step by step?

acceptedAnswer.text: The process usually starts with auditing current mentions, then identifying priority questions, updating pages with answer-first content, and adding schema. After that, ongoing tracking shows whether your pages are appearing more often and more accurately in AI outputs.
acceptedAnswer.description: It usually follows four steps: audit, prioritize queries, optimize content and schema, then monitor results.

description: It usually follows four steps: audit, prioritize queries, optimize content and schema, then monitor results.
